data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Netflix utilizes a microservices architecture to enable rapid deployment and scaling.
data.technical_spec: Leveraging AWS for scalable infrastructure, each service is independent.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: The use of CDNs optimizes content delivery globally.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Open Connect, a proprietary CDN, for efficient bandwidth usage.

data.title: Distributed Database
data.description: Netflix uses distributed databases for reliability and high availability.
data.technical_spec: Employs Cassandra for its distributed nature and resilience.

data.title: Cloud-based Infrastructure
data.description: Entirely cloud-based to handle the massive data load and flexibility
data.technical_spec: Primary adoption of AWS services for infrastructure needs.

data.title: Resilience Engineering
data.description: Ensures system resilience and fault tolerance.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes chaos engineering practices to test and ensure robustness.
